name: libio-prompter-perl
title: libio-prompter-perl
summary: Perl module to prompt for input, read it, clean it, return it
description:
Perl module to prompt for input, read it, clean it, return it
IO::Prompter exports a single subroutine, prompt, that prints a prompt (but
only if the program's selected input and output streams are connected to a
terminal), then reads some input, then chomps it, and finally returns an
object representing that text.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libio-prompter-perl because Perl module to prompt for input, read it, clean it, return it.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libio-prompter-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libio-prompter-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libio-prompter-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
